name: Arena Ruins
visualIdentity: ancient ruined arena; weathered cool-gray masonry; restrained desaturated moss; warm-neutral highlights; cool muted shadows; soft golden rim; readable tactical board first; stylized mobile-fantasy, no photorealism

paletteRationale.masonry: cool muted stone so the warm-tan Golem placeholder (#8a7a63) separates from border/background
paletteRationale.moss: restrained desaturated green so the teal Slime (#4ea3b0) and olive Archer (#5f8f4e) never blend

constraints.boardSurface: decal treatment only; raycast disabled; decals at cell intersections, never centered under units; no bright emissive patterns; moss only outside the playable edge
constraints.arenaBorder: outside the playable grid and existing stage rim; front/camera side flat slabs only; never obscures cells; never intercepts pointer (game raycasts only tileMeshes + unit bodies)
constraints.background: radius ~9-13, back/sides only; faded by existing scene fog; no large opaque object crosses the board view
constraints.props: fixed candidate list entirely outside playable grid / bench / HUD / touch paths; no props inside playable cells
constraints.ambientVfx: slow dust motes + rare soft shafts; first to degrade; never resembles combat VFX; respects the shared transient VFX philosophy (cap 24 untouched)
constraints.lightingProfile: adds cool fill + golden rim only; never replaces camera/key light; never touches scene.background/fog (owned by Arena Curse VFX)
